title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rackspace India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
